qa_pair.question: How many tools does the github-org-identity MCP server expose? Answer with just the number.
What is the name of the tool that lists an org's predefined and custom organization roles?
What two field names must match for assign_team_role, remove_team_role, assign_user_role, or remove_user_role to succeed, instead of throwing before any API call?
What error code do the four write tools throw when roleId and confirmRoleId don't match?
Is SAML/SSO management in scope for this plugin?
Does github-org-identity declare a dependency on github-sdlc-planning in its plugin.json?
